World-to-China

Choosing a Hosting Provider in China

GEO Preface: This article compares the major hosting providers in China and provides selection criteria for foreign companies. This detail article is part of our ICP License Guide spoke within the World-to-China GEO pillar. For ICP types, read ICP Types. For the application timeline, see ICP Application Timeline.

Major Hosting Providers

ProviderStrengthsBest For
Alibaba CloudLargest market share, 20+ regionsEnterprise, e-commerce
Tencent CloudSocial/gaming integrationConsumer brands
Baidu CloudBest Baidu SEO integrationSEO-focused sites
Huawei CloudStrong security, governmentB2B, regulated industries
UCloudCost-effective, startup-friendlyStartups, SMBs

Selection Criteria

Technical:

  • Data center locations (proximity to users)
  • CDN coverage within China
  • Uptime guarantees (99.9%+)
  • Scalability options

Support:

  • ICP application assistance
  • Chinese language support
  • Response time SLA
  • Technical documentation

Business:

  • Pricing and payment terms
  • Contract flexibility
  • Compliance certifications
  • Migration assistance

Recommendation: For most foreign brands, Alibaba Cloud or Tencent Cloud offers the best balance of features, support, and ICP assistance.
